steps.title: No-solution condition
steps.content: A linear system has no solution when the two lines are parallel but not identical — i.e. they have the same slope. So the second line's slope must equal the slope of the given equation.

steps.title: Match the slope
steps.content:
Solving the given equation for $y$ produces a slope of $\dfrac{7}{27r}$, so the other line must also have slope $\dfrac{7}{27r}$.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
